title: let's go starter
description: pikachu and eevee from let's go without the jacket in cobblemon
body:
apparently this doesn't work properly in 1.21.1 because all i tested was the model. my b. gonna take more work than expected. should be better next release.
- licenses this project includes: [https://gitlab.com/cable-mc/cobblemon-assets/-/blob/master/blockbench/pokemon/gen1/0025_pikachu/LICENSE](https://gitlab.com/cable-mc/cobblemon-assets/-/blob/master/blockbench/pokemon/gen1/0025_pikachu/LICENSE) vanilla model's license, [https://modrinth.com/datapack/poke-costume](https://modrinth.com/datapack/poke-costume) (MIT) the hat
- SK4N's [eeveelutions reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eeveelutions-reimagined) required for eevee in v5 (1.7+ will not require it, but still recommended)
- TODO (1.7): 0. make it actually work in 1.21.1 1/2/3. pikachu revamp/cosmetic item integration/pokedex 4. actually shading the pixels to look good
- i activated the pikachu form using a datapack, then added an edit of [RedRibbonz](https://modrinth.com/user/RedRibbonz) pikachu model for this.
- **BOTH datapack AND resource pack. 2 in 1 file.**
- required for exclusive moves such as "zippy zap" [SimpleTMs neoforge/fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/simpletms-tms-and-trs-for-cobblemon)
- starter json included
- i have decided not to add sounds (at least not a priority, will eventually.) [this has anime sounds if you want, however it's not specific to any forms.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-anime-cries-soundpack)
